# call-bound

[![github actions](https://img.shields.io/endpoint?url=https://github-actions-badge-u3jn4tfpocch.runkit.sh/ljharb/call-bound)](https://github.com/ljharb/call-bound/actions) [![coverage](https://codecov.io/gh/ljharb/call-bound/branch/main/graphs/badge.svg)](https://app.codecov.io/gh/ljharb/call-bound/) [![dependency status](https://david-dm.org/ljharb/call-bound.svg)](https://david-dm.org/ljharb/call-bound) [![dev dependency status](https://david-dm.org/ljharb/call-bound/dev-status.svg)](https://david-dm.org/ljharb/call-bound#info=devDependencies) [![License](https://img.shields.io/npm/l/call-bound.svg)](../../../node_modules/call-bound/LICENSE/) [![Downloads](https://img.shields.io/npm/dm/call-bound.svg)](https://npm-stat.com/charts.html?package=call-bound)

[![npm badge](https://nodei.co/npm/call-bound.png?downloads=true\&stars=true)](https://npmjs.org/package/call-bound)

Robust call-bound JavaScript intrinsics, using `call-bind` and `get-intrinsic`.

## Getting started

```sh
npm install --save call-bound
```

## Usage/Examples

```js
const assert = require('assert');
const callBound = require('call-bound');

const slice = callBound('Array.prototype.slice');

delete Function.prototype.call;
delete Function.prototype.bind;
delete Array.prototype.slice;

assert.deepEqual(slice([1, 2, 3, 4], 1, -1), [2, 3]);
```

## Tests

Clone the repo, `npm install`, and run `npm test`
